text_block_list.name: Young McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ryan! This way! Hurry!

text_block_list.name: Young Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff... Wait up!

text_block_list.name: Young Ryan
text_block_list.text: McQueen, you ran off too fast!

text_block_list.name: Young McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh... I'm sorry.

text_block_list.name: Young McQueen
text_block_list.text: I just have so much fun running with you. Sniff...

text_block_list.name: Young Ryan
text_block_list.text:
O-okay, okay! Then, I'll make up for it and catch
up to you!

text_block_list.name: Young McQueen
text_block_list.text: Really?! Hehe, yay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Patter, patter, patter...

text_block_list.name: Young Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ah... Hey! Wait for me to catch up fiiirst!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ngh... Was that... a dream?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
(How nostalgic... It's been a long time since I
dreamt of my childhood.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: (Could it be because I'm seeing her today?)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh, now is no time to dawdle. I must hurry and
get ready.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Chatter chatter...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Well, this is certainly a crowd befitting a G1 race.
Now then, where in the world is—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: McQueen! Over here! Over heeere!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh, Ryan! I'll be right there!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Impressive, Ryan. I can't believe you managed to
get front-row seats.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
The view is more impactful from the front seats.
Hey, I'm sure you know that from baseba—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ack, sorry! I forgot that's a secret.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'm sure no one could hear you in all this
noise.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Today, we're mere spectators ourselves. Let's just
enjoy the race!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Good point. Right, I'm gonna cheer till I'm hoarse!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is a day off from training for Mejiro
McQueen and I.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a G1 race being held today, so I decide
to watch at the racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's off to a great start! Now the battle for
the lead begins!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm astonished at how loud the crowd is. G1 races
sure inspire great enthusiasm from the viewers.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Gooooo! This is where the race really starts!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Everyone, this is your chance to take a good
position!
choice_data_list: Is that McQueen and Mejiro Ryan?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh my! Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
My apologies, but my attention is on the race
right now! If you want to talk, please wait until
afterward!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
—has just broken away from the pack and
snatched first place!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That was a good race. The competition remained
close all the way until the end.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I could feel their drive and unrelenting willpower.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you could tell how much they didn't want
to lose to their rivals, and how important this race
was to them.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Guess they've all got pretty big dreams, huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
On another note, I was really surprised to run into
you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ahaha. No kidding.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I'm the one who invited McQueen to
watch the G1 race with me today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
We decided to see for ourselves the location
where we'd one day compete.
choice_data_list: After New Year's, you'll be classic racers.
After New Year's, you'll be classic racers.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. All Umamusume dream of competing in
the historic Classics.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I'm no exception, even though my ultimate goal is
the Tenno Sho.
choice_data_list: Let's give it everything we've got!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I will focus my efforts in earnest to achieve
success.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Now that the race is over, we should be on our
way.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Why don't we all go have tea together?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh, sorry... I've got training to do now!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ah, I see.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Then don't worry about it. Enjoy your training.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Okay. Later, you two!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, no.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I was just thinking about Ryan's strong passion for
the Classics.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Of the Mejiro family, I'm the one who's expected
to win the Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
And Ryan is expected to win the Classic Triple
Crown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The curtain rises on this series of
once-in-a-lifetime Classic races.

text_block_list.name: Young McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ryan! This way! Hurry!

text_block_list.name: Young Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff... Wait up!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
(...Ever since I was little, I've been chasing after
you.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
(After a certain point, I started to think it was
normal. But thinking back on it now...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: (I realize I still haven't managed to catch up.)
